sections.title: Objective
sections.llm_guidance: State the singular quality goal for the feature under test. Reference the Jira summary and description only.

sections.title: Scope
sections.llm_guidance: Define in-scope testing types (functional, API, UI, regression, etc.) implied by the ticket. Do not copy unrelated product examples.

sections.title: Inclusions
sections.llm_guidance: List concrete scenarios, flows, or acceptance areas to cover based on the ticket.

sections.title: Test Environments
sections.llm_guidance: Describe environments needed (browsers, OS, APIs, test data). Use placeholders if unknown.

sections.title: Defect Reporting Procedure
sections.llm_guidance: How defects are logged (Jira project, severity, attachments). Generic SOP acceptable.

sections.title: Test Strategy
sections.llm_guidance: High-level approach: levels of testing, automation vs manual, risk focus from ticket.

sections.title: Test Schedule
sections.llm_guidance: Milestone-style table or bullets; use TBD dates if not specified.

sections.title: Test Deliverables
sections.llm_guidance: Artifacts: test cases, reports, evidence, sign-off.

sections.title: Entry and Exit Criteria
sections.llm_guidance: Include subsections for overall, test execution, and test closure entry/exit criteria as bullet lists.

sections.title: Tools
sections.llm_guidance: Testing tools (Jira, X-Ray if relevant, automation frameworks) as applicable.

sections.title: Risks and Mitigations
sections.llm_guidance: Risks tied to the feature and mitigations.

sections.title: Approvals
sections.llm_guidance: Table or list: Role | Name | Signature | Date — use TBD.
